sentence: 这里的旅游业近年来蓬勃发展。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de lǚyóuyè jìn nián lái péngbó fāzhǎn.
english: The tourism industry here has been flourishing in recent years.

sentence: 他工作表现出色，老板决定给他加薪。
pinyin: Tā gōngzuò biǎoxiàn chūsè, lǎobǎn juédìng gěi tā jiāxīn.
english: His performance was outstanding, so the boss decided to give him a raise.

sentence: 爷爷一辈子都在耕种这片土地。
pinyin: Yéye yī bèizi dōu zài gēngzhòng zhè piàn tǔdì.
english: Grandpa spent his whole life cultivating this land.

sentence: 运动前喝一杯高能量饮料提提神。
pinyin: Yùndòng qián hē yī bēi gāo néngliàng yǐnliào tí ti shén.
english: Have a high-energy drink before exercising to boost your energy.

sentence: 这部电影大部分情节都符合史实。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng dàbùfen qíngjié dōu fúhé shǐshí.
english: Most of the plot in this film is consistent with historical facts.
